title: Aug–Dec 2026 Short Course Drive / Capacity Building Enhancement
shortDescription: The revised short courses delivery schedule for August to December 2026 is now available.
fullDescription:
We are pleased to announce our upcoming Short Courses and CPD programmes scheduled to run from August to December 2026.

The revised short courses delivery schedule is now active. For comprehensive details on the programmes, please check the CPD & Short Courses PDF available in the Downloads section of our website.
author: Director

title: April Intake Orientation 2026
shortDescription: We successfully welcomed our April 2026 intake at a vibrant orientation held at our Foxdale main campus, marking the beginning of an exciting academic journey for our newest students.
fullDescription:
Lusaka South University College is delighted to announce the successful completion of the April 2026 Intake Orientation Programme, held at our Foxdale Main Campus.

The event brought together new students from various programmes across the college, setting the tone for a fulfilling and transformative academic experience ahead.

Orientation Highlights:

  • A warm welcome address from the College Principal and Academic Dean
  • Introduction to college policies, academic regulations, and student conduct
  • Overview of available student support services, including counseling and career guidance
  • Campus tour covering key facilities — library, laboratories, computer labs, and sports complex
  • Q&A session with student representatives and departmental heads

A Message to New Students:

To all our new students — welcome to the LSUC family! This orientation marks the beginning of your journey toward professional excellence. We encourage you to take full advantage of everything our campus has to offer — academically, socially, and personally.

We look forward to walking this journey with you. Together, let us build a future of excellence!

— Administration, Lusaka South University College
author: Admin
